extension.summary: Sync Kodi playback with a friend~ over Hamachi LAN
extension.description: NuiSync lets you watch together in perfect harmony! Host or join a cozy watch session to sync play, pause, seek, and stop between two Kodi instances over a Hamachi virtual LAN. Pure Python sockets, no extra dependencies~ Works beautifully with Fen Light, Cocoscrapers, and TorBox.
